items.a: A PROVIN audit is a consultative digital service: we combine available history data, listing analysis and model-specific technical risk insight into one clear report with recommendations. It helps you make an informed buying decision, but it does not replace an in-person workshop inspection and is not an official government extract or a legally binding certificate.

items.q: How does PROVIN MINI differ from PROVIN AUDIT?
items.a: PROVIN MINI (€39.99) focuses on listing and technical risk analysis, EU/Latvian public registries and inspection history, in-person viewing tips and a personal consultation — recommended for cars already used in Latvia. PROVIN AUDIT (€99.99) includes the MINI scope plus deeper international history checks with paid databases (e.g. carVertical, autoDNA) and official dealer / auction archive data where available — especially useful for imported cars.

items.q: How is PROVIN different from a standard history PDF?
items.a: A standard report is often an automated fact sheet. PROVIN interprets the data: we compare sources, analyse the listing and typical model risks, and deliver an expert summary in plain language — not just tables.

items.q: How much does it cost and how long does delivery take?
items.a: PROVIN MINI — €39.99; PROVIN AUDIT — €99.99 (also shown at checkout). We aim to email the report within 48 hours after successful payment and complete order details. If extra time is needed (rare models, delayed data), we will let you know.

items.q: What do I need to provide when ordering?
items.a: A VIN (17 characters) or plate number, email and phone. A listing URL is optional, but if you provide one, please use the full link to that specific listing — it helps a more precise analysis.

No database is perfect. We compare sources and highlight contradictions or gaps. The verdict supports your decision but does not replace a workshop inspection. An additional in-person check is recommended in any case.
Use the email link in the website footer or the WhatsApp button (bottom right) to open a chat with our number.
